creator: prayer@list.ru
text:
May be we need to use gmake instead of make for this port.

--- Makefile.orig       2011-08-11 12:39:10.000000000 +0400
+++ Makefile    2011-08-11 16:32:27.000000000 +0400
@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@
 COMMENT=       X font libary
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=   freetype.9:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
+USE_GMAKE=     YES
 
 XORG_CAT=      lib
 USE_XORG=      xproto:both xtrans fontsproto:both fontenc
